case_title: GREGORY ROBERTS VS. DORIS LILIANA PALACIOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,486.29 FILED BY ROBERTS, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, DORIS LILIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED NOV-14-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, DORIS LILIANA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, GREGORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALACIOS, DORIS LILIANA $1,810.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,860.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, DORIS LILIANA
